steps.title: Identify the advantage
steps.content: The notes say infilling is minimally invasive, while power grinding can alter or damage the rock. The answer should explain infilling's advantage over grinding.

steps.title: Compare the two methods
steps.content: A mentions only why grinding can be infeasible, C blurs the two methods, and D says they differ without naming the advantage. The sentence explaining that infilling is less invasive gives the needed benefit. The answer is B.
